PROP-01b-partial2-inv-003.text: _multiCall in auctionCallback must not allow transferring contract token balances to arbitrary addresses.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-003.assertion: forall solution in auctionCallback: no _call(target, data) where data encodes transfer(attacker, amount) on held tokens

locations.note: decodes Call[] from data and passes to _multiCall with no allowlist on targets or calldata
executes arbitrary calls; no restriction on target addresses or calldata
low-level call with arbitrary target and data
